meta.title: DEF CON 30 - Demo Labs
meta.description:
Silk gets schooled on DEF CON's showcase for new open-source projects, the Demo Labs.

See more of SIlk's hacker videos at :
YouTube.com/alexchaveriat
YouTube.com/hackerhangouts
